top_signals.summary: Ongoing disruption stemming from the conflict in the Middle East is doing more than just driving up operational expenses; it is actively reshaping the relative commercial viability of alternative fuels, according to experts at ING. top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index Eases for 6th Day
top_signals.summary: The Baltic Exchange’s dry bulk freight index, which monitors rates for ships carrying dry bulk commodities, fell for the sixth consecutive session on Friday, down 1.8% to the lowest since May 21 at 2,981 points.
